families.flowchart:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Ship?}
  B -->|yes| C[Deploy]
  B -->|no| D[Fix]
families.state:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Draft
  Draft --> Review : submit
  Review --> [*] : approve
families.sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant S as Server
  U->>S: request
  S-->>U: response
families.timeline:
timeline
  title Roadmap
  2025 : Alpha : Beta
  2026 : GA
families.class:
classDiagram
  class Account {
    +id: string
    +close() void
  }
  Account <|-- Savings
  Account "1" o-- "*" Transaction : logs
families.journey:
journey
  title Checkout
  section Browse
    Find product: 4: Shopper
  section Buy
    Pay: 3: Shopper
families.architecture:
architecture-beta
  group backend(cloud)[Backend]
  service api(server)[API] in backend
  service db(database)[Database] in backend
  service cache(disk)[Cache] in backend
  api:R --> L:db
  api:B -[reads]-> T:cache
families.xychart:
xychart-beta
  title "Revenue"
  x-axis [Q1, Q2, Q3]
  y-axis "USD" 0 --> 100
  bar [45, 62, 80]
families.quadrant:
quadrantChart
  title Prioritize
  x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
  y-axis Low Value --> High Value
  Quick win: [0.2, 0.8]
  Money pit: [0.8, 0.2]
families.gantt:
gantt
  title Plan
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  section Build
  Implement :a1, 2026-01-05, 5d
  Review :after a1, 2d
families.mindmap:
mindmap
  root((Product))
    Research
      Interviews
      Evidence
    Delivery
      Launch
families.gitgraph:
gitGraph
  commit id:"base"
  branch feature
  commit id:"work"
  checkout main
  commit id:"release"
  merge feature id:"merge"
